case_title: ELIAS, LUISA GISELLA vs. HARPER, JR., STEVEN THOMAS et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELIAS, LUISA GISELLA AS TO DEFENDANT HARPER, JR., STEVEN THOMAS DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-08-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-07-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       DEC-19-1995

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-08-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JAN-08-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR FEB-07-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
